channel.title: About on Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in About on Portfolio

item.title: About
item.description: PDF (ENG) | PDF (RU) Summary Wanna be Software Engineer interested in Low-Level Engineering, Computer Graphics, System Design, rebuilding existing “round wheels” as “square” ones and passionate for low-level concepts and underlying implementations. Currently self-learning Graphics programming with OpenGL and C++ Rust programming language General Experience Basics in Computer and Network Security, Database Management, Computer Graphics, Embedded Systems, Machine Learning Linux loadable kernel module (LKM) development Docker/Docker Compose deployment Gitlab CI/CD configuration Version Control with Git
